summary: Muno Round 5 shipped a Firestore-only calendar view: the widget catalogue grew from 23 to 24 templates with calendar_view, the Material CalendarView renderer supports static display_events and live Firestore events_path reads, and the itinerary agent can extract a calendar note, render calendar_view, and write the calendar event through mcp/firestore. No Google Calendar API or ICS export was added.
ai_meta_submodule_pointer_bump_sha: this ai-meta commit (self-referential field; see git log HEAD)

calendar_view_modes.notes: Static and live modes are covered by CalendarView tests. Live mode subscribes only when display_events is absent; without Firebase web config it renders the configured empty state safely.

agent_calendar_writes_smoke.flight_order_confirm_writes_2_or_4_event: implemented for generated flight events; not live-smoked in this round to avoid a paid/test-order flow
agent_calendar_writes_smoke.hotel_pick_confirm_writes_2_events: implemented for picked_hotel_id; not live-smoked in this round because the direct user-note calendar path was the narrow Firestore write proof

firestore_rules.mode: demo-permissive unauthenticated reads; browser writes disabled

verdict: GREEN. The durable deliverable landed in Muno and the GKE smoke proved the Firestore-only calendar_view/user_note write path end-to-end. Additional fix-forward PRs were needed after live smoke exposed NoETL Python scoping and templated-input edge cases; those are merged on main.
